<parameter=code>

</parameter>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! After clicking the left N-shape, the green part shrank from 5 rows back to 2 rows (rows 37-38), and the red dot moved from (40, 16) back to (37, 16). So the left N-shape shrinks the green part (moves red dot up), and the right N-shape expands it (moves red dot down).
So the green container's N-shapes control vertical movement of the green part:
- Left N-shape → shrinks (moves red dot up by 3)
- Right N-shape → expands (moves red dot down by 3)
Now I need to figure out what the other containers do. The target is at (31, 52), and the red dot is at (37, 16). I need to move:
- Row: 37 → 31 (up by 6, need 2 left N-shape clicks)
- Col: 16 → 52 (right by 36)
But the green container only controls vertical movement. I need another container to control horizontal movement. Let me check the other containers.
The yellow container has Y-shapes. In Level 1, the Y-shapes controlled vertical movement. But here, the green container's N-shapes control vertical movement. So maybe the Y-shapes control horizontal movement in this level?
Let me try clicking the right Y-shape in the yellow container to see what happens.
Actually, wait. Let me look at the shapes more carefully:
- Orange container: C-shapes (left and right)
- Sky blue container: C-shapes (left and right)
- Yellow container: Y-shapes (left and right)
- Green container: N-shapes (left and right)
The C-shape is a U-shape open to the side. The Y-shape is... let me check.
Row 56: gcYYYcGcYYYcg
Row 57: gcYcccGcccYcg
Row 58: gcYYYcGcYYYcg
The Y-shape is also a U-shape, same as the N-shape! The left Y-shape is YYY on top, Yccc in middle, YYY on bottom (open to the right). The right Y-shape is YYY on top, cccY in middle, YYY on bottom (open to the left).
So the Y-shape and N-shape have the same shape (U-shape), just different colors. This means the color of the shape determines which colored part it controls, and the position (left/right) determines the direction.
For the green container (N-shapes):
- Left N-shape → shrinks green part (moves red dot up)
- Right N-shape → expands green part (moves red dot down)
For the yellow container (Y-shapes):
- Left Y-shape → ?
- Right Y-shape → ?
Let me try clicking the right Y-shape to see what it does.

<parameter=code>
# Try clicking the right Y-shape in the yellow container
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 42}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
